tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: Angel Falls, the world's highest waterfall, is found here
The Amazon rainforest covers a large part of this continent
It separates Europe from the Americas
It is the largest and deepest ocean on Earth
It is the smallest ocean, located around the North Pole
The Nile, one of the longest rivers, flows through this continent
The Andes, the longest mountain range, runs along its west coast
The Gulf Stream is a warm current that flows through it
It contains the Mariana Trench, the deepest point on Earth
It is surrounded by the Ring of Fire, an area of volcanic activity
It is home to the Sahara, the world's largest hot desert
Mount Kilimanjaro, the tallest peak in Africa, stands here
